page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.52xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the ecs.re6 instance family, running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 208 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8269CL processors, with a 1.0 thread-to-core ratio, meaning hyperthreading is disabled. This configuration provides a highly predictable compute environment with dedicated CPU allocation.

The instance is equipped with 3072.0 GB of RAM, translating to approximately 14.77 GB of memory per core, which positions it as a memory-optimized resource. There is no local storage bundled with this instance, requiring the attachment of external cloud storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

Given the massive memory capacity and dedicated physical core count, this server is designed for large-scale, memory-intensive workloads. It is highly suitable for in-memory databases, large-scale enterprise applications, and complex data processing tasks that require substantial RAM without GPU acceleration. The lack of hyperthreading ensures consistent performance per core, making it a robust choice for workloads where resource contention must be minimized.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.52xlarge is a memory-optimized x86_64 server within the ecs.re6 family, operating on the KVM hypervisor. It is equipped with 208 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8269CL processors, featuring a 1.0 thread-per-core ratio that eliminates hyperthreading for predictable performance. The server provides 3072.0 GB of RAM, yielding 14.77 GB of memory per core, making it highly suitable for memory-intensive applications. It contains no local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage, and features a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. With its massive memory footprint and dedicated CPU allocation, this instance is designed for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and heavy data processing workloads that demand high memory density and consistent compute performance without GPU acceleration.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re6.52xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance featuring 208 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 3072 GB of RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for large-scale in-memory databases.

tagline: A high-density memory-optimized instance featuring two hundred eight dedicated physical cores and three terabytes of RAM for demanding enterprise workloads.
